messages.content:
Without Your Support we didn't Arrange this mega Divyang Cricket Tournament in West Bengal
Please Come forward to support our Noble Cause

1. Food Arranged for 60 Persons ( 6 Days Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
2. Room arranged for 45 Persons ( 6 Days )
3. Winner, Runner up, individual cash Prize
4. Dress Arranged for Participating Team
5. Ground Decoration, Trophies, Memento, Duce Ball, Traveling Cost, water, umpire, score, Commentator, Live Telecast , Banner, invitation Card, Medical kits , Healthy Drinks, Sound System, Supporting Staff,Extra Expenses 

Thank you ððð

#AICAPC #divyangcricket #bcci #ajitwadekartrophy2024 

Shri Ajit Wadekar Trophy 2024

Team Eastern Eagles is led by their exceptionally promising captain Suman Dey who is the youngest amongst all other captains in this tournament. He hails from the town of Chakdaha, State of West Bengal. He has been associated with AICAPC for nearly 7 years now. He is a student.

Players to watch out for - Sukumar Mahato, Basant Rathour, Mahesh Shaw, Aryan Rajgupta and Purnab Orow.

West Bengal Divyang Cricket Association 
We are waiting for someone to say that we are with you.

Subject: Request for CSR Fund for Differently Abled Cricketers of West Bengal

I hope this email finds you well.

I am reaching out to introduce the West Bengal Divyang Cricket Association, a sister concern of the Fulia Divyan Warriors Cricket Association. Our organization is registered for undertaking CSR activities and is dedicated to promoting sports, particularly cricket, and empowerment among differently abled individuals in West Bengal.

Our mission is to support differently abled cricketers in our region. We provide specialized coaching, equipment provision, tournament participation opportunities, skill development workshops, and medical support to ensure that these individuals have access to the resources they need to excel in cricket despite their challenges.

We firmly believe that every individual, regardless of their physical abilities, should have the opportunity to participate in and benefit from sports. By supporting our initiative, you will directly impact the lives of differently abled cricketers in West Bengal, enabling them to pursue their passion and achieve their goals.

We are reaching out to seek your assistance in the form of a Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) fund to sustain and expand our program. Your contribution will not only empower these individuals but also promote inclusivity, diversity, and social cohesion within our community.

Rest assured, every rupee contributed will be utilized judiciously and transparently to maximize impact and reach as many beneficiaries as possible. Additionally, all legal documents and a yearly budget of the association are attached to this email for your reference.

We sincerely hope that you will consider supporting our cause and join us in making a positive difference in the lives of differently abled cricketers in West Bengal.

Thank you for considering our request. Should you have any questions or require further information, please do not hesitate to contact us at 8617224047.

Warm regards,
Abhijit Biswas
Founder & Secretary
West Bengal Divyang Cricket Association
Email ID: westbengaldivyangcricket@gmail.com 
Website: wbdivyangcrick.com

share.share_text: We strive to provide equal opportunities for differently-abled individuals to participate in cricket without any discrimination or barriers
